`+'html[dir=ltr],[data-sonner-toaster][dir=ltr]{--toast-icon-margin-start: -3px;--toast-icon-margin-end: 4px;--toast-svg-margin-start: -1px;--toast-svg-margin-end: 0px;--toast-button-margin-start: 95.1%);--gray4: hsl(0, 0%, 93%);--gray5: hsl(0, 0%, 90.9%);--gray6: hsl(0, 0%, 88.7%);--gray7: hsl(0, 0%, 85.8%);--gray8: hsl(0, 0%, 78%);--gray9: hsl(0, 0%, 56.1%);--gray10: hsl(0, 0%,
